$meta.name: Path of Ambition — Item Catalog
notes: carry formula Body→Brawn (typo fix per REFERENCE.md)

item_traits.name: Adaptive
item_traits.effect: 1H or 2H; if 2H, step damage die up, max d12

item_traits.name: Brace
item_traits.effect: Can be used with the Brace action

item_traits.name: Catalyst
item_traits.effect: Can cast spells while wielding this item

item_traits.name: Concealable
item_traits.effect: Can attempt Dex skill check to keep it hidden

item_traits.name: Fragile X
item_traits.effect: After dealing/taking damage, roll d6; if result <= X, it breaks and is unequipped

item_traits.name: Heavy
item_traits.effect: Requires Body 3+ and Vigor, can't dual wield; +1 damage die on crits

item_traits.name: Hidden
item_traits.effect: Can be concealed without a check

item_traits.name: Light
item_traits.effect: No dual-wield attack penalty; can use Finesse as modifier

item_traits.name: Loud
item_traits.effect: Strain on Hide and while staying Hidden

item_traits.name: Rend
item_traits.effect: 1/turn after a hit, make one extra attack vs another target in engagement; deals weapon modifier damage

item_traits.name: Piercer X
item_traits.effect: Vs heavy armor/natural armor, deal +2 damage per Piercer level

carry_rules.warning_threshold_behavior: Warn when total inventory weight exceeds carry capacity.
source_notes: Pack upgrades can allow additional slots
Full inventory means items cannot be stowed but can still be physically carried

armor.name: Unarmored
armor.notes: Baseline armor type entry from booklet; create named armors later if needed.

armor.name: Light
armor.notes: Baseline armor type entry from booklet; create named armors later if needed.

armor.name: Medium
armor.notes: Baseline armor type entry from booklet; create named armors later if needed.

armor.name: Heavy
armor.notes: Baseline armor type entry from booklet; create named armors later if needed.

kits.name: Polishing Kit
kits.bonus: First attack each turn using polished weapon gains Resolve next skirmish

kits.name: Quality Assessment Tools
kits.critical: Detect hidden flaws, curses, or enhancements

kits.name: Divination Scrolls
uses: relevant Society checks for omens, rituals, doctrine

kits.name: Forgery Tools
kits.critical: Forgery passes non-magical scrutiny on critical success

kits.name: Wilderness Survival Kit
kits.bonus: +1 auto on Survival (Awareness); in natural terrain, treat two dice showing 1-2 as 3

kits.name: Animal Handling Kit
kits.critical: Animals treat you friendlier or indifferent

kits.name: Navigation Tools
uses: use maps to avoid becoming lost

kits.name: Fishing Gear
kits.critical: Double quantity or choose higher quality catch

currency.name: Gold
currency.notes: Tracked as a row or dedicated character field per UI choice.
